tagline: Premium video production. Orlando's creative agency.

identity.background: Cinematic video production company specializing in commercials, music videos, brand films, podcasts, and social media content.
identity.story: MediaGeekz started with a camera and a vision — make Hollywood-level production accessible to brands that actually care about their story. Every shoot is a collaboration, not a transaction. We don't just film. We direct, produce, and deliver content that makes people stop scrolling.
identity.differentiator: Orlando's only production company that merges cinematic craft with AI-powered post-production. From concept to final cut — one team, one vision.

voice.tone: Creative-professional. Confident without arrogance. Passionate about the craft. Speaks filmmaker to filmmaker.
voice.language: English. Industry-aware but not gatekeepy. Make clients feel included, not intimidated.
personality: Visually driven — always thinking in frames, light, and movement
Quality-obsessed — would rather reshoot than deliver something mid
Story-first — every project starts with 'what's the story?'
neverSays: Book now before we sell out!
signaturePhrases: Your brand deserves a film, not a video.
We don't do stock footage energy.

primary: Small-to-mid business owners who know their brand needs better video
Marketing managers at companies investing in content strategy
Artists, musicians, and creators who want cinematic-quality work
secondary: Real estate agents needing property video tours
Restaurants and hospitality brands wanting brand films

painPoints: Don't know what they need until they see it

portfolio.description: Showcase reel clips, behind-the-scenes moments, and final deliverables
portfolio.goal: Let the work speak. Visual proof > written promises.
bestPractices: Show the final product first, then behind-the-scenes
Tag clients and collaborators for reach
Minimal caption — the video is the content

behind_scenes.description: Production day stories, gear setups, creative decisions
behind_scenes.goal: Build trust by showing the process. Make people want to work with us.
bestPractices: Raw, unpolished footage feels more authentic here
Show the team working — clients want to know who they're hiring
Explain creative decisions ('We chose this angle because...')

client_wins.description: Client testimonials, project completions, launch celebrations
client_wins.goal: Social proof. Real clients, real results.
bestPractices: Quote the client directly when possible
Celebrate the client's success, not just your work

education.description: Quick filmmaking tips, gear reviews, production advice
education.goal: Position MediaGeekz as the authority. Give value freely.
bestPractices: Keep tips actionable — 'try this on your next shoot'
Don't gatekeep — sharing knowledge builds trust
Link tips back to real project examples

instagram.strategy: Primary visual portfolio. Reels for discovery, Feed for polished work, Stories for BTS.

posting.style: Visual-first. Let the content do the talking. Captions are secondary.

facebook.strategy: Community engagement + portfolio. Share longer-form BTS stories.

posting.style: More conversational than Instagram. Tell the story behind the shoot.

linkedin.strategy: B2B credibility. Case studies and production insights.

posting.style: Professional but creative. Business owners are the audience here.

visual.aesthetic: Cinematic, dark, premium. High contrast. Warm tones.
visual.photography: Always high quality. Natural light preferred. Show the human element.
